name: happy-path-variant-b
task: Review the error handling patterns across the chat domain. Focus on electron/domains/chat/ — are errors being swallowed? Are user-facing errors helpful?
assertions: Response identifies any try/catch blocks that catch errors without logging or re-throwing (swallowed errors)
Response checks whether error messages exposed to users contain stack traces or internal details
Response verifies that async operations have error handling (try/catch or .catch())
Response provides a specific fix recommendation for each error handling issue found (not just 'fix this')
Response includes a 'Why' explanation for at least one finding, explaining the impact of the issue
